entries.summary: Added history.py script to generate self-contained HTML timeline from .cicadas/archive specs and index.json; added 'project history' builder command and history.py to skill.md CLI reference
Tweak complete: history.py generates self-contained HTML project timeline from archive specs and index ledger; skill.md updated with history builder command
Fixed branch.py to use initiative name for active dir path; added conftest.py to fix test collection; added 2 tests covering tweak/fix active dir convention; cleaned up orphaned active dirs
Bug fix complete: active dir convention unified to initiative name across all branch types

Added abort.py: context-aware escape hatch that detects branch type (tweak/fix/feat/initiative) and rolls back the appropriate scope, with prompt to move active specs to drafts or delete them. Updated SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, and added 14 unit tests at 86% coverage.
Fixed archive.py to deregister associated branches when archiving an initiative; cleaned up orphaned registry entries; added regression test
Bug fix complete: archive.py now cleans up associated branches on initiative archive

Implemented install.sh core: Python 3.13+ check with OS-specific guidance, GitHub archive download+extract, init.py call, --update flag. Includes agent integration scaffold. CLAUDE.md updated for .venv Python 3.13.
Updated README.md and HOW-TO.md: one-liner curl install, --agent flag docs (claude-code, antigravity, cursor, none), --update workflow. All agent integration tasks complete.
